# Set Dont Destroy On Load

**Menu:** `Actions/Object/Properties`

**Nome serializado:** `SetDontDestroyOnLoad`

**Classe fonte:** `C:/Users/Lucas/AndroidStudioProjects/ITsMagic/ITsMagicEngine V2/app/src/main/java/com/itsmagic/engine/Engines/Engine/NoCode/Nodes/Actions/ObjectRelated/Properties/SetDontDestroyOnLoadNode.java`

**Fluxo de saida superior:** `Sim`

## Funcao

Atualiza `Dont Destroy On Load` usando os valores recebidos nas entradas.
